response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong emphasis on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack requirements. His roles at re:cinq and Optilyz highlight direct experience with AI agent infrastructure, AWS, and scalable systems, while his open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and contributions to diverse tech stacks (Java, Kotlin, DLang) reflect versatility and depth. His leadership in workshops and TDD practices further underscores his technical excellence and collaborative mindset.
strengths: Proven expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React with recent industry experience (re:cinq, Optilyz)
Strong background in scalable systems, AI agent infrastructure, and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects, mentorship (workshops), and TDD/DevOps practices
concerns: Limited exposure to Nest.js (primary stack requirement) in the resume; however, extensive backend experience with Node.js suggests adaptability
No explicit mention of Vitest testing framework, though Jest and Playwright are implied via general testing expertise
International work experience may require time zone alignment for collaboration

key_factors.factor: AI agent infrastructure and scalability experience
